approval_thresholds.description: All approval threshold rules (AT-001 to AT-015) are pure numeric range checks on currency and amount.

preferred_suppliers.description: All preferred supplier entries are pure lookups by (supplier_id, category_l1, category_l2, region_scope).

restricted_suppliers.description: All restricted supplier entries are country-scope or value-conditional checks.

CR-001.rule_text: At least three compliant supplier options must be compared above EUR/CHF 100000
CR-001.check_logic: Count non-hard-fail suppliers from stage4 results >= 3

CR-002.rule_text: Mobile workstation requests above 50 units require compatibility review with engineering or CAD lead
CR-002.llm_question: Is there evidence in the request text that a compatibility review with engineering or CAD lead has been completed or is planned?

CR-003.rule_text: Break-fix pool replenishment below EUR/CHF 75000 may use fast-track approval with one quote
CR-003.check_logic: If amount < 75000 and correct category, fast-track eligible (1 quote sufficient)

CR-004.rule_text: Requests marked with data residency constraint must be evaluated only against suppliers supporting residency requirements
CR-004.check_logic: If data_residency_required, verify all shortlisted suppliers have data_residency_supported == true

CR-005.rule_text: Managed platform requests above EUR/CHF 250000 require security architecture review
CR-005.llm_question: Is there evidence in the request text that a security architecture review has been completed, is planned, or has been requested?

CR-006.rule_text: Reception and lounge projects require business design sign-off before award
CR-006.llm_question: Is there evidence in the request text that business design sign-off has been obtained or is planned before award?

CR-007.rule_text: Named consultant CVs or equivalent capability profiles are required above 60 consulting days
CR-007.llm_question: Is there evidence in the request text that named consultant CVs or equivalent capability profiles have been provided or will be required?

CR-008.rule_text: Cybersecurity advisory suppliers must demonstrate relevant certifications or equivalent references
CR-008.llm_question: Does the request text mention or require that suppliers demonstrate relevant cybersecurity certifications (e.g., ISO 27001, CREST, OSCP) or equivalent references?

CR-009.rule_text: SEM proposals should include performance baseline or benchmark assumptions
CR-009.llm_question: Does the request text mention or require performance baselines, benchmarks, or KPI assumptions for the SEM proposal?

CR-010.rule_text: Influencer campaigns require brand-safety review before final award
CR-010.llm_question: Is there evidence in the request text that a brand-safety review has been completed or is planned before final award?

GR-001.rule_text: Swiss data residency-sensitive cloud requests prefer sovereign or approved providers
GR-001.llm_question: Based on the request context, are the shortlisted suppliers considered sovereign or approved providers for Swiss data residency requirements?

GR-002.rule_text: Urgent end-user-device requests in Germany require delivery capability within requested deadline
GR-002.llm_question: Based on the request text, does the supplier demonstrate delivery capability within the requested deadline for this urgent German order?

GR-003.rule_text: Business-facing services for France should support French-language delivery where relevant
GR-003.llm_question: Does the request text indicate whether French-language delivery support is needed, and if so, can the suppliers provide it?

GR-004.rule_text: Large furniture and device rollouts in Spain should evidence installation or deployment support
GR-004.llm_question: Does the request appear to be a large rollout, and if so, is there evidence of installation or deployment support from suppliers?

GR-005.rule_text: US data sovereignty: financial and healthcare data must remain in-country; verify supplier US data centre availability for sensitive workloads
GR-005.llm_question: Does the request involve financial or healthcare data that requires US data sovereignty, and do the shortlisted suppliers have US data centre availability?

GR-006.rule_text: APAC data localisation: India RBI, Singapore MAS, and Japan FISC guidelines apply to financial data. Verify supplier in-country data residency for regulated categories.
GR-006.llm_question: Does the request involve regulated financial data subject to APAC data localisation requirements (RBI/MAS/FISC), and do the suppliers support in-country data residency?

GR-007.rule_text: UAE PDPL and South Africa POPIA compliance required for personal data processing. Validate supplier compliance documentation before award.
GR-007.llm_question: Does the request involve personal data processing in UAE or South Africa, and is there evidence of supplier PDPL/POPIA compliance documentation?

GR-008.rule_text: Brazil LGPD and Mexico LFPDPPP apply. Data processing agreements (DPA) must be in place before contract signature.
GR-008.llm_question: Does the request involve data processing in Brazil or Mexico, and is there evidence that DPA requirements (LGPD/LFPDPPP) have been addressed?

ER-001.check_logic: Check PRS field completeness — are required fields (category, quantity, budget, currency, delivery_countries) populated with confidence > 0.5?

ER-002.check_logic: Cross-reference: is any preferred supplier for this category also in the restricted list for the delivery countries?

ER-003.check_logic: Does estimated_total_value exceed the highest standard threshold for the currency?

ER-004.check_logic: Count of non-hard-fail suppliers from stage4 == 0

ER-005.check_logic: data_residency_required == true AND no supplier in stage4 results has data_residency_supported

ER-006.check_logic: Exactly 1 non-hard-fail supplier in stage4 results

ER-008.trigger: Supplier not registered or sanctioned-screened in delivery country
ER-008.llm_question: Is there any indication in the request or supplier data that the supplier is not registered or has not been sanctioned-screened in the delivery country?

_metadata.description: Classification of all policies in policies.json into deterministic (pure Python), semi-deterministic (deterministic gate + LLM tail), and qualitative (LLM-only) categories.
